chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-369 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on MA No.2401/2026 For hearing of main case. 25.03.2026 Mr. Adnan Ahmed Khan, Advocate for applicant alongwith applicant =========== 1. Urgency granted. 2. Applicant Faisal Karim S/o Abdul Karim Shaikh seeks protective bail in FIR bearing Crime No.03 of 2026 registered at Police Station Composite Circle, FIA, Hyderabad, for offences under Sections 406, 419, 420, 34 PPC. Learned counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicant due to malafide intentions; that the applicant being law abiding citizen wishes to face trial; however, he apprehends that before reaching trial Court he might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced; therefore seeks legal protection. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of six days subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of five days i.e. 30.03.2026 or when the applicant surrenders himself before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Asif I. Khan

J U D G E Asif I. Khan ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-370 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on MA No.2404/2026 For order on office objection For order on MA No.2405/2026 For hearing of main case. 25.03.2026 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Mallah, Advocate for applicants alongwith applicants =========== 1. Urgency granted. 2. Objection(s) Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicants Meer Hazar Khan S/o Ali Hassan, Zulfiqar Burdi S/o Tabar Ali Burdi, Fida Hussain S/o Ali Nawaz Burdi and Sadam Hussain S/o Tabar Ali Burdi seek protective bail in FIR No.02 of 2026 registered at Police Station Mahi Otho @ Karampur District Jamshoro, for offences under Sections 324, 114, 148, 149, 504, 337-H(ii), 337-A(i), 337-F(i), 427 PPC. Learned counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicants due to malafide intentions; that the applicantss being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, they apprehend that before reaching trial Court they might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced; therefore seek legal protection. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of six days subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) each and P.R bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of five days i.e. 30.03.2026 or when the applicants surrender themselves before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in above terms.

This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of five days i.e. 30.03.2026 or when the applicants surrender themselves before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Asif I. Khan
